iEdison Description: iEdison Invention Report Number that this patent is associated with
Transformation Notes: Use the iEdison report number stored on the parent Technology record. Dedicated field recommended (see Gap Candidates).

iEdison Description: Exact title of the US patent or application
Patent application classification: ORD, CIP, CON, DIV, PROV, PCT, PVP, RCE
Transformation Notes: Value mapping required — see table below. TTS picklist missing ORD / CIP / PVP / RCE.

iEdison Description: Patent filing status: Active, Expired, Abandoned
Transformation Notes: Map TTS status: Pending/Filed/Granted/In Force → Active; Expired/Lapsed → Expired; Abandoned/Withdrawn/Cancelled → Abandoned.

iEdison Description: Internal reference number of the grantee/contractor
Date the Confirmatory License was executed (MM/DD/YYYY). Required when the confirmatoryLicense file attachment is included in the multipart submission.
Transformation Notes: Important Bayh-Dole compliance date. No equivalent field in TTS. New date field needed on Protection (see Gap Candidates).

iEdison Description: US non-provisional patent application number. Required for ORD / DIV / CON / CIP types.
Transformation Notes: Submit this sub-object only when patentApplicationType is ORD / DIV / CON / CIP.

iEdison Description: Filing date of the non-provisional application (MM/DD/YYYY)
Transformation Notes: Convert Salesforce Date to MM/DD/YYYY.

iEdison Description: Unique identifier for the provisional patent application. Required for PROV type.
Transformation Notes: Submit this sub-object only when patentApplicationType = PROV.

iEdison Description: Filing date of the provisional application (MM/DD/YYYY)
Transformation Notes: Convert Salesforce Date to MM/DD/YYYY.

iEdison Description: Patent Cooperation Treaty application number. Required for PCT type.
Transformation Notes: Submit this sub-object only when patentApplicationType = PCT.

iEdison Description: Filing date of the PCT application (MM/DD/YYYY)
Transformation Notes: Convert Salesforce Date to MM/DD/YYYY.

iEdison Description: Patent number assigned by USPTO when issued
Date the patent number was issued (MM/DD/YYYY)
Transformation Notes: Convert Salesforce Date to MM/DD/YYYY.

iEdison Description: Estimated patent expiration date (MM/DD/YYYY)
Transformation Notes: TTS Expiration Date is a Formula field (Filing Date + 20 years). Cannot be set directly. May need a new raw Date field, or read the formula output and convert.

iEdison Description: Inventor first name
Transformation Notes: Same traversal as Invention API: TTS_Inventor__c on the related Technology → Contact lookup.

iEdison Description: Inventor last name
Transformation Notes: Same as firstName.

iEdison Description: Middle name or first initial
Transformation Notes: Optional.

iEdison Description: True if inventor is a federal government employee
Transformation Notes: Same gap as Invention API. New field needed on Inventor.

iEdison Description: Federal agency (if fedEmployee = true)
Transformation Notes: Same gap as Invention API. New field needed on Inventor.

iEdison Description: Country of the foreign filing. Must match iEdison country list (Section 12.4).
Transformation Notes: In TTS, each jurisdiction is a separate Protection record in the same Protection Family. Iterate Protection Family members where Type implies foreign filing. Map TTS Jurisdiction picklist value to iEdison country name.

iEdison Description: Status of the foreign filing (Active / Expired / Abandoned)
Transformation Notes: Apply same status mapping as patentStatus above to each sibling Protection record.

iEdison Description: Date the foreign filing was made (MM/DD/YYYY)
Transformation Notes: Convert Salesforce Date to MM/DD/YYYY for each sibling record.

iEdison Description: iEdison invention report number of a parent patent
Transformation Notes: Look up sibling Protection records in the same Protection Family that are marked as parent/earlier priority. Requires iEdison report numbers stored on related Technology records.

iEdison Description: Docket number of a parent patent
Transformation Notes: From the parent Protection record in the same family.

iEdison Description: Notes about the patent report for the agency
Transformation Notes: No direct TTS field. Could source from a Notes/Description field on Protection. Requires implementation decision.

iEdison Description: Notes by federal agency users (ignored if submitted by institution)
Transformation Notes: Ignored on org/institution submissions.
